message:
Fix OCSF link validation and use latest stable version

- Update landing page to link to specific version instead of /latest redirect
- Fix broken ocsf operators link by listing individual operators
- Update version table to include 1.8.0-dev
- Ensure redirects and sidebar point to latest stable version (1.7.0)
- Update sync script to find latest stable (non-dev) version for references

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -27,7 +27,7 @@ our [release page](https://github.com/tenzir/docs/releases/tag/latest).
   <LinkCard
     title="Schema"
     description="Browse event classes, objects, and profiles"
-    href="/reference/ocsf/latest"
+    href="/reference/ocsf/1-7-0"
   />
   <LinkCard
     title="FAQs"
@@ -51,25 +51,29 @@ our [release page](https://github.com/tenzir/docs/releases/tag/latest).
 We publish all OCSF schema versions with full cross-references between classes,
 objects, profiles, and types.
 
-| Version                        | Classes | Objects | Profiles | Types |
-| ------------------------------ | ------- | ------- | -------- | ----- |
-| [1.7.0](/reference/ocsf/1-7-0) | 83      | 170     | 12       | 24    |
-| [1.6.0](/reference/ocsf/1-6-0) | 82      | 167     | 12       | 24    |
-| [1.5.0](/reference/ocsf/1-5-0) | 81      | 161     | 12       | 24    |
-| [1.4.0](/reference/ocsf/1-4-0) | 79      | 142     | 12       | 22    |
-| [1.3.0](/reference/ocsf/1-3-0) | 72      | 121     | 10       | 22    |
-| [1.2.0](/reference/ocsf/1-2-0) | 65      | 111     | 9        | 22    |
-| [1.1.0](/reference/ocsf/1-1-0) | 50      | 106     | 8        | 22    |
-| [1.0.0](/reference/ocsf/1-0-0) | 36      | 84      | 6        | 22    |
+| Version                                | Classes | Objects | Profiles | Types |
+| -------------------------------------- | ------- | ------- | -------- | ----- |

+| [1.6.0](/reference/ocsf/1-6-0)         | 82      | 167     | 12       | 24    |
+| [1.5.0](/reference/ocsf/1-5-0)         | 81      | 161     | 12       | 24    |
+| [1.4.0](/reference/ocsf/1-4-0)         | 79      | 142     | 12       | 22    |
+| [1.3.0](/reference/ocsf/1-3-0)         | 72      | 121     | 10       | 22    |
+| [1.2.0](/reference/ocsf/1-2-0)         | 65      | 111     | 9        | 22    |
+| [1.1.0](/reference/ocsf/1-1-0)         | 50      | 106     | 8        | 22    |

 For complete offline processing, download an AI-optimized snapshot of our entire
 documentation at our [GitHub release
 page](https://github.com/tenzir/docs/releases/tag/latest).
 
 ## Using OCSF with Tenzir
 
-Tenzir provides native support for OCSF through the
-[`ocsf` operators](/reference/operators/ocsf). You can normalize events to OCSF,
+Tenzir provides native support for OCSF through the `ocsf.*` operators:
+[`ocsf.apply`](/reference/operators/ocsf/apply),
+[`ocsf.cast`](/reference/operators/ocsf/cast),
+[`ocsf.derive`](/reference/operators/ocsf/derive), and
+[`ocsf.trim`](/reference/operators/ocsf/trim). You can normalize events to OCSF,
 validate schema compliance, and work with OCSF-formatted data throughout your
 pipelines.
